Bey Herrn Haag dem Buchbinder in der Augustiner-Gasse sind zu verkauffen: <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ludwig Gottfrieds</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Beschreibung von Schweden</TITLE>, mit viel schönen Kupferen, <PLACE>Franckfurt</PLACE> <YEAR>1632</YEAR>. <FORMAT>fol</FORMAT></BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Rollin</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Histoire Romaine</TITLE> <VOLUME>II. Carten</VOLUME></BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":12,"explanation":"Fixed character encoding issues (e.g., 'Gasse', 'schönen', 'Jena', 'Frantzösischer'), corrected malformed attribute syntax in the Clericus entry, fixed typos in Latin abbreviations (Lips., horae, Act.), and corrected volume/format numerals (II. instead of IT./11., 8vo instead of 8v6)."}

parsed.explanation: Fixed character encoding issues (e.g., 'Gasse', 'schönen', 'Jena', 'Frantzösischer'), corrected malformed attribute syntax in the Clericus entry, fixed typos in Latin abbreviations (Lips., horae, Act.), and corrected volume/format numerals (II. instead of IT./11., 8vo instead of 8v6).
